allow: PowerShell(python -c "import pythainlp; import os; p = os.path.dirname\(pythainlp.__file__\); print\(os.listdir\(p\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "from pythainlp.tag import named_entity; import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(named_entity\)\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 100)
PowerShell(python -c "from pythainlp.tag import NER; t = NER\('thainer'\); print\([m for m in dir\(t\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)" 2>&1)
